app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.39 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for a stronger main playback source, clearer server quality labels, better TV stability, and cleaner download messages.
releaseNotes: Added a stronger main native playback source before fallback servers
Added clearer quality labels to server choices
Fixed TV profile switching crashes during kids profile changes
Improved profile picture browsing stability on TV
Fixed a home banner crash and restored cleaner banner return behavior
Improved TV focus on player loading and error actions
Improved anime playback recovery when the first anime stream source is empty
Cleaned download quota warnings so users no longer see raw JSON text
Replaced hardcoded profile version text with the installed app version

items.title: The Cube 2.0.39
items.message: TV stability, anime playback recovery, and download messages were improved.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
